Job description

FULL STACK INTERN

 

POSITION OVERVIEW:

The software developer intern’s role at Winthrop Capital Management (WCM) is designed to provide high potential candidates with a challenging, meaningful, and supportive opportunity to experience software development in the financial world. The primary focus of the position will focus on helping with WebWOMBAT™, a proprietary web-based wealth management application that provides a comprehensive solution to investment issues. The position requires a disciplined, organized, and engaged individual who can remain adaptable in an evolving environment. The ideal candidate would have the ability to contribute in a positive manner to our culture by providing and receiving direct feedback, possessing the discipline to hold oneself accountable, and the desire to continually learn.

RESPONSIBILITIES:

Implement REST and GraphQL APIs using ASP.NET Core.
Write unit and integration tests.
Contribute to CI/CD workflows, containerization, and release automation.
Collaborate with team members to design, implement, and test new features.
Debug and troubleshoot issues in existing software.
Participate in code reviews and follow coding standards.
Write and maintain technical documentation.

SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

Understanding of the software development lifecycle and Git-based workflows
Familiarity or experience with .NET and ASP.NET Core for web APIs
Basic knowledge of SQL and data access (e.g. Entity Framework Core)
Excellent problem-solving skills
Ability to communicate effectively both written and verbally
C#, .NET8, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, Angular, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, GraphQL, Webpack, SQL, Docker, Git, RESTful APIs, Azure services, Visual Studio, Agile

 

COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Winthrop Capital Management was founded in 2007. We implement value-oriented investment strategies in both equity and fixed income portfolios and serve both institutional and individual investors. Our goal is to provide outstanding long-term investment performance results consistent with the risk tolerance and investment constraints of each client. We seek to provide highest level of service to our clients to help them achieve their investment objectives.

WCM MISSION

Our goal is to help our clients achieve successful financial outcomes in relation to their specific Investment Management objectives. To accomplish this, we focus on long-term goals and create solutions that will realistically help clients achieve those goals with minimum risk.

 

Winthrop Capital Management is an equal opportunity employer.

About the employer
Winthrop Capital Management

Investment / Portfolio Management

Follow
10-50 employees

20 East 91st Street Suite 200 Indianapolis, IN 46240

Winthrop Capital Management is an Indianapolis-based SEC registered investment advisor specializing in the management of equity, high-grade and high yield fixed income portfolios for institutions and private clients. Working through a network of investment consultants and advisors, Winthrop Capital Management offers value-based equity strategies, as well as, corporate, municipal, and government bond strategies in customized Separately Managed Accounts (SMA).
